## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)
On October 13, 1911, Ashok Kumar (born Kumudlal Ganguly), the incredibly massive, universally revered, and absolute foundational icon of Indian cinema, was officially born in Bhagalpur, Bihar. Affectionately and heavily known as "Dadamoni," he achieved absolute, historical immortality by aggressively starring in the massive 1936 blockbuster *Achhut Kannya*.
